template.name: Student Programs

span.t-attf-class: badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.stage_code == 'done' else 'primary' if program.stage_code in ['applied', 'confirmed'] else 'warning' if program.stage_code in ['submitted', 'draft'] else 'danger' if program.stage_code == 'cancelled' else 'info' }}

badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.gs_state == 'approve' else 'danger' if program.gs_state == 'reject' else 'warning' if program.gs_state == 'revised' else 'info' if program.gs_state == 'in_progress' else 'secondary' }}

t.t-value: 100 if (program.stage_code == 'visa_processing' and program.visa_state in ['approve', 'reject']) else 100 if program.stage_code == 'done' else 80 if (program.stage_code == 'visa_processing' and program.visa_state == 'apply') else 60 if (program.stage_code == 'final_offer' and program.final_offer_state == 'received') else 60 if program.stage_code == 'visa_documentation' else 40 if (program.stage_code == 'final_offer' and program.final_offer_state != 'received') else 40 if program.stage_code == 'tuition_fee' else 40 if program.stage_code == 'gs_state' else 40 if program.stage_code == 'sponsor_document' else 40 if program.stage_code == 'offer_letter' else 40 if (program.stage_code == 'applied' and program.apply_state == 'submit') else 20 if (program.stage_code == 'applied' and program.apply_state in ['in_progress', 'pending']) else 20 if program.stage_code == 'confirmed' else 0

span.t-attf-class: badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.stage_code == 'done' else 'primary' if program.stage_code in ['applied', 'confirmed'] else 'warning' if program.stage_code in ['submitted', 'draft'] else 'danger' if program.stage_code == 'cancelled' else 'info' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.apply_state == 'submit' else 'info' if program.apply_state == 'in_progress' else 'warning' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.offer_letter_state == 'accepted' else 'info' if program.offer_letter_state == 'issued' else 'danger' }}

badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.gs_state == 'approve' else 'danger' if program.gs_state == 'reject' else 'warning' if program.gs_state == 'revised' else 'info' if program.gs_state == 'in_progress' else 'secondary' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.visa_state == 'approve' else 'danger' if program.visa_state == 'reject' else 'info' }}

div.class: alert alert-success d-flex align-items-center py-2 mb-2
div.div:
You have agreed to proceed with this program.
(on )

div.class: alert alert-danger d-flex align-items-start py-2 mb-2
div.div:
You have disagreed with this program.
Reason:

div.class: alert alert-warning d-flex align-items-center py-2 mb-2
div.div: Awaiting your decision — Please let us know if you wish to proceed.

div.label: Your comment: *

textarea.name: comment
textarea.placeholder: e.g. I am not interested in this program, or I prefer a different course...

div.div: Your comment will be recorded and visible to the admissions team.

p.small:
Changed your mind?
Update your decision

div.label: Your comment: *

textarea.name: comment
textarea.placeholder: e.g. I am not interested in this program, or I prefer a different course...

div.div: Your comment will be recorded and visible to the admissions team.

textarea.name: comment
textarea.placeholder: e.g. I am not interested in this program, or I prefer a different course...

div.p: You haven't applied to any programs yet.
